nasb.text: Then I took the cup from the Lord’s hand and made all the nations to whom the Lord sent me drink it:

esv.text: So I took the cup from the Lord’s hand, and made all the nations to whom the Lord sent me drink it:

cnv.text: 於是我從耶和華的手中接過這杯，給列國喝，就是耶和華差遣我去的列國，

ccb.text: 于是，我从耶和华手中接过杯，奉祂的差遣到列国去给他们喝。
